name: gtm-icp
description: GTM-as-code: a backend-free Claude plugin that finds B2B accounts matching your ICP, then enriches, classifies and scores them into a prioritized target list for outreach — grounded on your own corpus, bring your own keys.

apollo_api_key.title: Apollo API key
apollo_api_key.description: Apollo.io API key used by the enrich skill (firmographics) and the people skill (contact search), both sync REST. Leave blank to run local: enrich is firmographic-only and people returns persona targets (the titles to pursue) instead of contacts.

perplexity_api_key.title: Perplexity API key
perplexity_api_key.description: Perplexity API key for the discover skill's internet-grounded account research. Leave blank to disable discovery; you can still enrich/classify accounts you supply directly.

k2_api_host.title: K2 API host
k2_api_host.description: Base URL of a Knowledge2 corpus API (e.g. https://api.knowledge2.ai). When set with k2_api_key and k2_corpus_id, classify/personalize ground their reasoning on your private corpus via the bundled k2_query.py retrieval client (POST /v1/corpora/{id}/search:batch). Leave blank to ground on local corpus files instead.

k2_api_key.title: K2 API key
k2_api_key.description: K2 API key sent to the K2 API host as `X-API-Key`. Required when k2_api_host is set.

k2_corpus_id.title: K2 corpus ID
k2_corpus_id.description: ID of the K2 corpus to retrieve grounding from. Required when k2_api_host is set; without it, grounding falls back to local corpus files.
